forbids: SDK root importing/exporting ./mapgen or Civ7 adapter imports outside mapgen runtime subpath
why: General SDK authoring APIs stay runtime-neutral; mapgen bindings are explicit opt-in.
message: Keep Civ7 map runtime bindings behind @mateicanavra/civ7-sdk/mapgen.

pathCoverage.reason: Rule requires explicit typed path coverage before exact classify routing.
